creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:49:01 2014
New Revision: 350322
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350322
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350322/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		188193
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-HTML-Pager/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-HTML-Pager/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-HTML-Pager/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:48:57 2014	(r350321)
+++ head/www/p5-HTML-Pager/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:49:01 2014	(r350322)
@@ -7,9 +7,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl module for handling CGI HTML paging of arbitrary data
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-HTML-Template>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-HTML-Template
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
